associated_with.description: Specifies a general or thematic relationship between the subject and the object.

born_in.description: Specifies the location or realm where the subject was born.

buried_in.description: Specifies the location where the subject is entombed or buried.

child_of.description: Indicates that the subject is the offspring or descendant of the object.

creates.description: Indicates that the subject authored, forged, or brought the object into existence.

defeats.description: Indicates that the subject conquered or bested the object in a conflict.

deity_of.description: Indicates that the subject is a divine figure representing or ruling the object.

derived_from.description: Indicates that the subject's name, origin, or nature originates from the object.

dies_in.description: Specifies the location or circumstance in which the subject died.

founds.description: Indicates that the subject established or created a location, group, or institution.

friend_of.description: Indicates a friendly or companionable relationship between the subject and object.

god_of.description: Indicates that the male or gender-neutral subject is the divine ruler or embodiment of the object.

goddess_of.description: Indicates that the female subject is the divine ruler or embodiment of the object.

identified_with.description: Indicates that the subject is synonymous with, or heavily equated to, the object.

lives_in.description: Specifies the location or realm where the subject resides.

located_in.description: Specifies the geographical or physical region where the subject is found.

lover_of.description: Indicates a romantic or sexual relationship distinct from formal marriage.

owns.description: Indicates that the subject possesses or has mastery over the object.

parent_of.description: Indicates that the subject is the mother or father of the object.

ruler_of.description: Indicates that the subject holds authority or dominion over the object.

sacred_to.description: Indicates that the subject (e.g., a location or artifact) is dedicated to or holy to the object.

servant_of.description: Indicates that the subject serves, attends, or acts as a retainer to the object.

sibling_of.description: Indicates that the subject and object share one or more parents.

slays.description: Indicates that the subject killed or fatally destroyed the object.

spouse_of.description: Indicates a formal marital union between the subject and the object.

suitor_of.description: Indicates that the subject actively pursued a romantic or marital union with the object.

travels_to.description: Indicates that the subject journeys or has relocated to the object location.

visits.description: Indicates a temporary journey or stay by the subject at the object location.
